title: Unexpected case matching behavior for signed values compared against unsigned constants

features.name: signed register case comparison with unsigned constant
features.description: Code should include a case statement where a signed register is compared against an unsigned constant with larger bit width

features.name: zero_extension of signed value to unsigned in case
features.description: Code should include a signed value that needs zero-extension when compared with unsigned constant in case statement

features.name: signed 3-bit value 3'b111 in case comparison
features.description: Code should include a signed 3-bit register assigned value 7 (binary 3'b111) compared in case statement against unsigned 4-bit constant
